meaning: adj.鏃犲埄鐩婄殑,涓嶈禋閽辩殑,娌℃湁鐢ㄧ殑
examples: The snag is that unprofitable companies, which should have been squeezed out by competition, have remained alive because it is so hard to fire workers.
Almost every product line is unprofitable.
The unprofitable ground services and cargo businesses would be sold off or wound down.
If our demands shift dramatically or discord renders existing production unprofitable, the economy must correct.
